rationale: Review 2 would lead to the better scoped PR because it correctly targets the clearly confirmed out-of-scope placeholder endpoints (`ReductiveGroup`/`SemisimpleGroup` with `True`, plus premature `IsUnipotent`) while preserving plausible foundational material for a smaller Layer-0-style PR. Review 1 shares the main real issue but its extra demand to split/remove `AffineAlgGroup` depends on roadmap claims not confirmable from the shown diff and could cause broader, less clearly necessary churn.
